---
title: "map draft"
author: "Alexa Gray"
date: "2025-03-07"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(sf)
library(tmap)
library(spData)
library(maps)
library(ggExtra)
```

```{r}
# Create Figure 1. Map of climate language
# 10 Aug 2022
# Cori Lopazanski


# Directories
data.dir <- file.path("data", "processed")

# Read Data -------------------------------------------------------------------
area_sf <- readRDS(file.path(data.dir, "processed-area-geometry.Rds"))
area    <- readRDS(file.path(data.dir, "processed-area-metadata.Rds")) %>% 
   select(mpa_id, plan_id)
review  <- readRDS(file.path(data.dir, "processed-doc-review.Rds")) # information plotted

orig_list <- readRDS("data/processed/orig_list.Rds")


# Build Data -------------------------------------------------------------------
# Get plan stats
climate_mention <- review %>% 
  as.data.frame() %>% 
  filter(q_code == "climate_mention" & type == "stat") %>% 
  select(plan_id, entry) %>% 
  mutate(climate_mention = case_when(entry == "1" ~ "Yes",
                                     entry == "0" ~ "No"))

# my plan stats EDU_SECT
## has a plan or not
edu_sect <- orig_list |> 
  distinct(plan_id, name, edu_section_binary) 


# Settings to avoid using spherical geometry package when converting
sf_use_s2(FALSE)

# Convert multipolygons to centroids
mpa_centroids <- area_sf %>% 
  st_make_valid() %>% 
  st_centroid() 

# Get lat/long from geometry
mpa_pts <- mpa_centroids %>% 
  st_coordinates() %>% 
  as.data.frame()

# Bind to a single data frame
mpa_df <- mpa_centroids %>% 
  cbind(mpa_pts) %>% 
  left_join(., area, by = "mpa_id") %>%  # left join of value that will be plotted
  left_join(., edu_sect) %>%
  left_join(., climate_mention, by = "plan_id") 



# Create axes labels
lat_labels <- c("60°S", "30°S", "0°", "30°N", "60°N")
lon_labels <- c("180°W", "150°W","120°W","90°W","60°W","30°W", "0°", "30°E", "60°E", "90°E", "120°E", "150°E","180°E")



### --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Get world basemap
world_data <- map_data("world")

# convert to factor
mpa_df_reviewed <- mpa_df %>% 
  mutate(edu_section_binary = factor(edu_section_binary)) %>% 
  filter(!is.na(plan_id)) |> 
  filter(!is.na(edu_section_binary))

g1 <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = world_data,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "grey90", color = "white", linewidth = 0.12) +
  geom_point(data = mpa_df_reviewed,
             aes(x = X, y = Y,
                 fill = edu_section_binary,
                 shape = edu_section_binary),
             color = "grey15", stroke = 0.25,
             alpha = 0.75, size = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("white", "#4c9a5f"),
    labels = c("No engagement section", "Engagement section present"),
    guide = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(shape = c(21, 24),
                          size = 2.8,
                  #       color = "grey15",
                          alpha = 1))) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 24), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(-185, 185), expand = c(0, 0),
    breaks = c(-180, -120, -60, 0, 60, 120, 180),
    labels = c("180°W", "120°W", "60°W",
               "0°", "60°E", "120°E", "180°E")) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-89, 89), expand = c(0, 0),
    breaks = c(-60, -30, 0, 30, 60),
    labels = c("60°S", "30°S", "0°", "30°N", "60°N")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  coord_quickmap() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey88", linewidth = 0.2),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "grey30", size = 7),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.key = element_blank(),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.28, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.15, "cm"),
    legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2))

g1

ggsave(file.path("figs", "Fig1_map.png"), g1, width = 7, height = 4, units = c("in"))

```

```{r}

g2 <- ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(data = world_data,
               aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
               fill = "grey90", color = "white", linewidth = 0.12) +
  geom_point(data = mpa_df,
             aes(x = X, y = Y,
                 fill = edu_section_binary,
                 shape = edu_section_binary),
             color = "grey15", stroke = 0.25,
             alpha = 0.75, size = 2) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("0" = "white",
               "1" = "#4c9a5f"),
    na.value = "grey40",
    breaks = c("0", "1", NA),
    labels = c("No engagement section",
               "Engagement section present",
               "No plan located"),
    guide = guide_legend(
      override.aes = list(
        shape = c(21, 24, 16),
        fill = c("white", "#4c9a5f", "grey40"),
        size = 2.8,
        alpha = 1
      ))) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("0" = 21,"1" = 24),
                     na.value = 16,
                     guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(-185, 185), expand = c(0, 0),
    breaks = c(-180, -120, -60, 0, 60, 120, 180),
    labels = c("180°W", "120°W", "60°W",
               "0°", "60°E", "120°E", "180°E")) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(-89, 89), expand = c(0, 0),
    breaks = c(-60, -30, 0, 30, 60),
    labels = c("60°S", "30°S", "0°", "30°N", "60°N")) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = NULL) +
  coord_quickmap() +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey88", linewidth = 0.2),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = NA),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "grey30", size = 7),
    axis.title = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "top",
    legend.direction = "horizontal",
    legend.background = element_blank(),
    legend.key = element_blank(),
    legend.key.height = unit(0.28, "cm"),
    legend.key.width = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    legend.spacing.x = unit(0.15, "cm"),
    legend.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.margin = margin(2, 2, 2, 2))

g2

ggsave(file.path("figs", "SI_Fig1_map.png"), g2, width = 7, height = 4, units = c("in"))
```
